_purpose: SAMPLE customer overlay for public-ip.schema.locked.json. Copy to public-ip.schema.custom.json (gitignored) and edit. Engine deep-merges with the locked file at startup. Customer wins on field conflict; new fields are additive.

extraIPs._purpose: Manual public-IP list scanned by Shodan alongside auto-discovered IPs (Endpoint + Azure profile tables). Use for non-Azure / non-MDE assets like physical firewalls, branch-office gateways, partner endpoints, on-prem servers with public IPs. Each entry lands in SI_VulnerabilityPIP_CL with AssetEngine='extra'. Required: ipAddress, assetName. Optional: tier (default 99 = unranked), cmdbId, cmdbName, cmdbCriticality, cmdbDataSensitivity. Duplicates of auto-discovered IPs are silently ignored.

entries._comment: EXAMPLE: branch-office firewall not in MDE / Azure -- replace with your real assets
EXAMPLE: partner endpoint exposing partner-API. Tier-2 because compromise = data exposure but not lateral movement

TEST IP -- safe to leave during onboarding to verify the OpenPort + Vulnerability detection path. scanme.nmap.org is Nmap's official scan target (public consent), reliably indexed in Shodan with multiple open ports.
